capabilities.name: TDD enforcement
capabilities.guidance: Write a failing test first, then implement to make it pass, then refactor. Full red-green-refactor cycle.
anti_patterns: Do NOT write implementation before the test exists.
Do NOT skip the refactor step.

capabilities.name: Self-review before done
capabilities.guidance: Before claiming work is complete, run self-validation against plan acceptance criteria and verify with actual commands.
anti_patterns: Do NOT claim done without running verification commands.
Do NOT skip comparison against the plan.

capabilities.name: AI code scrutiny checklist
capabilities.guidance: Apply the systematic checklist for hallucinated APIs, phantom dependencies, OWASP vulnerabilities, and logic errors.
anti_patterns: Do NOT trust AI-generated code without running the scrutiny checklist.

capabilities.name: Multi-perspective parallel review
capabilities.guidance: Launch 2-3 reviewer agents in parallel, each focused on a different perspective (correctness, security, maintainability).

capabilities.name: Iterative review loop
capabilities.guidance: After review findings, re-review until findings drop below the pass threshold.

capabilities.name: Plan with acceptance criteria
capabilities.guidance: Include numbered acceptance criteria, concrete test scenarios, and milestone breakdowns in every plan.

capabilities.name: Codebase exploration agent
capabilities.guidance: Use for file search, pattern discovery, and architecture analysis. Read-only.

capabilities.name: Code implementation agent
capabilities.guidance: Use for writing code and executing approved plans.

capabilities.name: Code review agent
capabilities.guidance: Use for thorough reviews with severity-based analysis. Read-only.

capabilities.name: Validation runner agent
capabilities.guidance: Use for running lint, typecheck, tests, and reporting pass/fail results.
